name: every SOX ITCC rule in the pre-authored finance-industry namespace cites the authoritative pcaobus AS 2201 URL from the C-13 registry
command: grep -c 'docs_url: https://pcaobus.org/oversight/standards/auditing-standards/details/AS2201' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/finance-industry/sox-itcc.yaml" | awk '$1 >= 3 { exit 0 } { exit 1 }' && echo sox-itcc-cites-pcaobus 1>&2
